name: Chox Rouge Aux Groseille Braise
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or yellow onion, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
(Braised Red Cabbage with Currants)
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
1. Toast caraway or cumin seeds in a roaster oven or frying pan until they smell nutty, about 1 minute.
2. In a large pot, heat wine over medium heat.
3. Add onion and salt, and sauté for 5 minutes, until the onion wilts and smells very sweet.
4. Add red cabbage and sauté over medium-low heat until it wilts slightly, about 5 minutes (Add water as needed to prevent sticking).
5. Stir in caraway or cumin seeds and currants.
6. Mix vinegar with water or apple juice, then pour over the cabbage and mix well.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly oil a 6-8 cup baking dish and transfer the cabbage and liquid into it. Cover and bake for 45 to 60 minutes.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature. Serves 6. This can be refrigerated in the dish for up to 3-4 days and reheated in a covered casserole in the oven.
